title: Microsoft says Work IQ APIs will give agents governed access to Microsoft 365 context
friendlyTitle: Microsoft is opening work context to AI agents
summary: Microsoft announced Work IQ APIs, scheduled for general availability on June 16, as an agent-oriented way to access Microsoft 365 context across email, calendar, meetings, chats, files, people and organizational knowledge.
friendlySummary: Microsoft’s Work IQ APIs are designed to help agents understand Microsoft 365 data such as email, meetings, files and organization context.
whyItMatters: The announcement points to a major enterprise pattern: agents need business context, not just raw documents. If implemented well, APIs like this can make workplace agents faster, less token-hungry and easier to govern.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Workplace AI becomes more useful when it knows the real context of your work. The challenge is keeping that power secure and properly controlled.
